response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a segment from Kazamai Iroha's 2026 birthday live. 2. Divided the video into two scenes: an intro talk segment (00:00-03:17) and a song performance segment (03:17-end). 3. Identified the performed song as 'Hakusen' based on on-screen text ('白線' / '作詞・作曲: ゴッタン人'). 4. Searched for the lyrics of 'Hakusen' by 'Gottan-jin' (ゴッタン人). No direct web result for lyrics was found, so I transcribed them directly from the video. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the transcribed lyrics and metadata.
response.global_summary: The video features Kazamai Iroha during her 'Seitan Live 2026' (Birthday Live), where she gives an introduction followed by a full vocal performance of her song 'Hakusen'.

scenes.description: Kazamai Iroha talks to the audience, giving introductions and announcements about the show, with background music playing but no vocals.
Kazamai Iroha performs her original song 'Hakusen', dancing and singing on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
澄み渡った空に白線
あの地平を超えて

始まりはちょっと軽い期待で
その欠片そっとポケットしまって
屋上遠い空の向こうを見ていた

この足でどこに行けるかなんて
わかってないけどわかってるんだ
白昼淡い月に手を伸ばした

かすれたエコーでも答えはもう
はじめからちゃんと持っていたんだよ
メイビーこの想いは
メイビーこの想いは
マスビー熱を増して
ほらね、飛べるんだ

もっと高く高くまで
羽ばたいてみたい
今に未来色の軌道描いて
地平の先まで

届かない歌はない
迷いはいらない
どんな世界も瞬間も揺るがない
アイが在るから

澄み渡った空に白線
羽ばたいたのアンビバレント
でも声はもう気づいてる
もっと高く高く高く飛んでいける！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A white line in the clear sky
Beyond that horizon

Starting with a light expectation
Putting the fragment gently into my pocket
Looking at the far side of the sky from the rooftop

I don't know where I can go with these feet
But I know, I understand
Reaching my hand out to the pale moon in the daylight

Even if it's aかすれた (faint) echo, the answer
I've had it with me from the start
Maybe this feeling
Maybe this feeling
Maybe it increases the heat
Look, I can fly

Higher and higher
I want to try spreading my wings
Drawing a future-colored trajectory to the present
To the edge of the horizon

There is no song that cannot reach
I don't need to hesitate
Neither any world nor any moment will shake
Because love is there

A white line in the clear sky
I spread my wings, ambivalent
But my voice is already aware
Higher, higher, higher, I can fly!
